---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new topic, service, or section to add to the notes
title: "[REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What topic/service would you like covered?**
A clear description of the AWS service, concept, or project you'd like documented.

**Where should it go?**
Suggested folder/section (e.g. `12-analytics-and-big-data/`).

**Why is this useful?**
Explain why this addition would help learners studying AWS.

**Additional context**
Links to AWS docs, whitepapers, or exam guides that relate to this request.
